name: bookshelf-generator
description: Turn a Goodreads profile into a shareable, embeddable bookshelf.

scripts.build: bun run --filter @dawdle.space/bookshelf build && bun run copy:bookshelf-css && vite build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @dawdle.space/bookshelf typecheck && bun run --filter @dawdle.space/bookshelf build && bun run --filter @dawdle.space/bookshelf-api typecheck && tsc --noEmit
